4a. LOAN & PROPERTY INFORMATION
5. DECLARATIONS
A. Will you occupy the property as your primary residence?
B. Family relationship or business affiliation with the seller?
C. Are you borrowing money for this transaction (down payment, closing costs)?
D. Applying for another mortgage on or before closing?
F. Co-signer or guarantor on any debt not disclosed?
G. Outstanding judgments against you?
H. Currently delinquent or in default on a federal debt?
J. Conveyed title in lieu of foreclosure in past 7 years?
K. Completed a short sale in past 7 years?
L. Property foreclosed in last 7 years?
M. Declared bankruptcy within past 7 years?
7. MILITARY SERVICE
Did you (or your deceased spouse) ever serve in the U.S. Armed Forces?

📊 Deal Analyzer & CMA

Investment comparison — Fix & Flip · BRRRR · Buy & Hold
🏘️ Comps & CMA sold & active comps within radius · powered by RentCast
AddressTypeBd/BaSqFtPrice$/SqFtDistStatusLast Seen
📥 Acquisition
💼 Closing & Fees
🔨 Flip Financing hard-money loan · Fix & Flip only
🏠 Rental & Financing used by BRRRR + Buy & Hold
Rental comps:
Annual NOI —
Cap Rate —
NOI = (Rent × (1−Vacancy) − Op-Ex) × 12 · Cap = NOI / Purchase
🔨 FIX & FLIP
Buy, renovate, and sell. Financed with hard-money; Cash to Close is what you bring.
🏠 BRRRR
Buy, renovate, rent, refinance out. Cash Left is your money still in after the refi.
🏘 BUY & HOLD
Buy and rent long-term on a standard mortgage. Cash Invested is your down + costs.

📈 Projected Equity
Yr 1 —

Yr 10 —
Appreciation-only on ARV · no loan paydown ·
💡 What Investors Typically Look For general rules of thumb · not Rates & Realty guarantees
🔨 FIX & FLIP
  • · ROI ≥ 10–15% on the deal
  • · Passes the 70% rule
  • · Target profit ~$25k–$50k+
🏠 BRRRR
  • · DSCR ≥ 1.20
  • · Positive monthly cash flow
  • · Ideally most/all capital recovered on refi
🏘 BUY & HOLD
  • · Cap rate ≥ 5–6%
  • · DSCR ≥ 1.25
  • · Positive cash flow
  • · Cash-on-cash ≥ 8%
